title: Kanidium
description: A personal modpack focused around the nvidium and figura mods.
body:
# Kanidium
## A personal modpack focused on nvidium

Originally designed as both an update to my previous modpack Fabulous Kanna and a private modpack, the modpack got bigger and changed its goals quickly. 

For Kanidium, I aim to add optimization and a boost in FPS via mods like nvidium and distant horizons. However shaders are still a big part of this modpack and the included modpacks are all supported by distant horizons (Unless specificly mentioned).

If you don't have a nvidia graphics card, or you enable shaders, the nvidium mod will automaticly disable itself.

The current focus is on 1.21 as it is currently the latest version nvidium supports.

There is a large collection of mods that provide tools for handeling your inventory, chests and more. The included mods, ViaVersion, ViaBackwards and ViaRewind, allow you to play on almost any version of minecraft server. This means you will be able to play on servers running on 1.21.1 as an example. This also includes bedrock servers.

# Features
- Optimization
- Enhanced animations and models
- Enhanced sounds and music
- Enhanced camera effects
- Extended GUI controls for ease of use
- Custom model and emote support via Figura
- Vanilla-themed resource packs
- Quality of life changes
- custom item models

# Important information
The versions of these mods are specific. To make sure it does not break, do not update them and wait for the modpack to be updated.

# Permissions

Icon art created by samogon.
Character belongs to me.

The most recent build of this modpack uses a devbuild for Figura. It is avalible on its own on the official Figura discord server which you can find a link to from their [website.](https://figuramc.org/)

Contained is also a modified version of gaming32's [mod loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-loading-screen)

The following are resource packs that were included but do not have a modrinth page. I own no rights to these and follow their guidelines for use in modpacks

- [Torrezx's Last laugh](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torrezx-the-last-laugh)
- [V Sword Art online](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/vanilla-sword-art-online)
- [Astromic's Amazing Hat pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/astromics-amazing-hat-pack) 
- [BrokenSawBlade CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/brokensawblade-cit)
- [mobs plushies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mob-plushies-cit)
